nasb.text: that they may walk in My statutes and keep My ordinances and do them. Then they will be My people, and I shall be their God.

esv.text: that they may walk in my statutes and keep my rules and obey them. And they shall be my people, and I will be their God.

cnv.text: 使他們遵從我的律例，謹守遵行我的典章，這樣，他們就必作我的子民，我必作他們的　神。

ccb.text: 使他们恪守我的律例，谨遵我的典章。他们将做我的子民，我将做他们的上帝。
